pageContext.name: Universal Monsters Mural
pageContext.description: Sideshow and RoomMates are excited to present the Universal Monsters Mural!  Your favorite Universal Monsters can be taken straight to your wall with the Universal Monsters Peel and Stick Wall Mural. Assembled it is 6 feet tall and 1.5 feet wide, and comes with 7 panels 18' wide and 72' long. Frankenstein, Bride of Frankenstein, Dracula, and other monsters look lively on your wall.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
